languages.text: "Я прикажу арестовать герцогиню. Затеять свару во время военного положения? Порой я не понимаю, как отец вообще их выносит".
languages.translation_comment: Повышается DL_JuvennaSuspicion_counter на +4, а DL_LariaTrust_counter на +1.

traits.locale_text: "Я прикажу арестовать герцогиню. Затеять свару во время военного положения? Порой я не понимаю, как отец вообще их выносит".

languages.translation_comment: Повышается DL_JuvennaSuspicion_counter на +4, а DL_LariaTrust_counter на +1.

languages.text: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."
languages.original_text: "Я прикажу арестовать герцогиню. Затеять свару во время военного положения? Порой я не понимаю, как отец вообще их выносит".

traits.locale_text: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."
"I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."
"I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."

languages.text: “我会下令逮捕女爵。大敌当前竟还挑起事端。有时候我真不明白，父亲怎么能忍得了她们。”
languages.original_text: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."

traits.locale_text: “我会下令逮捕女爵。大敌当前竟还挑起事端。有时候我真不明白，父亲怎么能忍得了她们。”

languages.text: « Je vais ordonner l'arrestation de la duchesse. Il faut être fou pour jeter de l'huile sur le feu alors que nous sommes déjà assiégés. Parfois, je me demande comment Père fait pour supporter ce ramassis d'imbéciles. »
languages.original_text: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais ordonner l'arrestation de la duchesse. Il faut être fou pour jeter de l'huile sur le feu alors que nous sommes déjà assiégés. Parfois, je me demande comment Père fait pour supporter ce ramassis d'imbéciles. »

languages.text: "Düşesin tutuklanmasını emredeceğim. Zaten saldırı altındayız, bir de başımıza sorun mu çıkarıyor? Bazen babamın bunlara nasıl tahammül ettiğini bir türlü anlayamıyorum."
languages.original_text: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."

traits.locale_text: "Düşesin tutuklanmasını emredeceğim. Zaten saldırı altındayız, bir de başımıza sorun mu çıkarıyor? Bazen babamın bunlara nasıl tahammül ettiğini bir türlü anlayamıyorum."

languages.text: «Ordenaré el arresto de la duquesa. ¿Causar problemas cuando estamos bajo ataque? A veces no entiendo cómo puede tolerar a esta gente mi padre».
languages.original_text: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."

traits.locale_text: «Ordenaré el arresto de la duquesa. ¿Causar problemas cuando estamos bajo ataque? A veces no entiendo cómo puede tolerar a esta gente mi padre».

languages.text: "Ich werde die Herzogin verhaften lassen. Für Unfrieden zu sorgen, während wir angegriffen werden? Manchmal verstehe ich nicht, warum Vater so etwas duldet."
languages.original_text: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde die Herzogin verhaften lassen. Für Unfrieden zu sorgen, während wir angegriffen werden? Manchmal verstehe ich nicht, warum Vater so etwas duldet."

languages.text: 「公爵夫人の逮捕状を発行する。すでに攻撃を受けているのに、騒ぎを起こすとは。父が彼らを容認していることさえ理解できない時がある。」
languages.original_text: "I will order the arrest of the duchess. Stirring up trouble when we're already under attack? Sometimes I don't understand how Father even tolerates them."

traits.locale_text: 「公爵夫人の逮捕状を発行する。すでに攻撃を受けているのに、騒ぎを起こすとは。父が彼らを容認していることさえ理解できない時がある。」
